svg.title: CiteRAG Lab — RAG pipeline flowchart
svg.desc: Two parallel tracks: ingestion pipeline on the left converting Notion documents to ChromaDB vectors, and Q&A pipeline on the right from user question to grounded answer with citations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Notion document ingestion work?')
sendPrompt('How is content extracted from Notion blocks?')
sendPrompt('How does chunking work with 500-word size and 50-word overlap?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB store chunks and metadata?')
sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the AI Assistant chat?')
sendPrompt('How does the refine_query tool work?')
sendPrompt('How does search_docs retrieve chunks from ChromaDB?')
sendPrompt('How does the Redis cache speed up retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure OpenAI generate the grounded answer?')
sendPrompt('How are citations formatted for users?')
sendPrompt('How is the answer cached in Redis?')
sendPrompt('What does the user see in the final answer?')

g.text: Doc A vs Doc B structured diff

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does RAGAS evaluate the RAG pipeline quality?')
sendPrompt('How does the ingestion cache in Redis prevent re-processing?')
